services.catalogueDescription: Discover our selection of certified dermatology products
services.aboutDescription: Learn more about our team and expertise

hero.title:
Your skincare,
certified.
hero.description: A dermo-cosmetic pharmacy curated by specialists. ISDIN, La Roche-Posay, Filorga and 10 more brands.

sun.title: Sun protection
sun.description: SPF 30 to 50+, light textures designed for the Dominican Republic's tropical climate.

repair.title: Repair & soothing
repair.description: Balms, serums and formulas targeted at sensitive, irritated or damaged skin.

brightness.title: Radiance & evenness
brightness.description: Anti-spot serums, vitamin C, niacinamide. For a more luminous, even tone.

expertise.title:
A pharmacy,
not a store.
expertise.p1: Every product in our catalogue is selected, tested and recommended by our pharmacist-dermatologists. We don't sell what's pitched to us — we sell what we'd prescribe.
expertise.p2: If you have a question about your skin, write to us. A real human, trained in dermo-cosmetics, will reply the same day.
expertise.signature: — An initiative led by a collective of Dominican pharmacists.

morning.title: Cleanse & protect
morning.description: Gentle cleansing gel, vitamin C serum, SPF 50 sunscreen. The minimum ritual to start the day under the tropical sun.

evening.title: Remove & regenerate
evening.description: Micellar water, hyaluronic acid serum, night cream. The moment skin accepts the most potent actives.

weekly.title: Exfoliate & nourish
weekly.description: Clay mask or gentle exfoliant. A weekly gesture to kickstart cellular regeneration.

newsletter.title:
Once a month,
no more.
newsletter.description: New releases, pharmacist tips, and subscriber-only offers. Promise it's short.
newsletter.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts, try again in a moment.

Contact.headerSubtitle: Our team of pharmacist-dermatologists is at your disposal to answer your questions

ContactForm.intro: A question, advice, or a quote request? Our team replies within 24-48h.

conditions.haveAccount: No account required to write to us
conditions.useAccountEmail: Provide a valid email where we can reply

About.heroDescription: The first 100% dermatological pharmacy in the Dominican Republic, FARMAU puts medical expertise at the service of your skin. Our pharmacist-dermatologists support you with personalized advice and a rigorous selection of clinically proven treatments.
About.teamDescription: Our pharmacist-dermatologists, trained in Europe and the United States, are continuously available to analyze your skin, decipher INCI lists and build a tailored routine.
About.qualityDescription: Because your skin deserves the best, we import only FDA / EMA certified treatments, tested under dermatological control and compliant with European standards.
About.addressValue: Calle Jesus de Galindez Esq. Calle 3, Cerros de Gurabo, Santiago, D.R.
About.value1Description: FDA/EMA approved products, clinically tested for your safety.
About.value2Description: Pharmacist-dermatologists trained in Europe and the United States.
About.value3Description: Skin analysis, custom routines and continuous follow-up for optimal results.

products.vitCDesc: Instant glow, wrinkles smoothed in 4 weeks

reviews.r1Content: Accurate skin diagnosis! A difference after two weeks.
reviews.r2Content: Wide variety of dermatological brands unavailable elsewhere.
reviews.r3Content: Effective post-acne protocol: dark spots halved!
reviews.r4Content: WhatsApp order ready in 10 min, very convenient.

trust.deliveryBody: Santo Domingo in 24h · rest of the country 2-3 days
trust.returnsBody: If the product doesn't suit you, we'll exchange it

pharmacist.fallbackQuote: For any question about this product, contact our pharmacist team.
